title: Orbit Lead
description: THE CONTRACT. Emitted by Voice/Intake (P1, Gemini-structured), consumed by Attio/Data (P2, write) and Orchestration (P3, read). Demo path = buy/rent (a person looking for a property). See wiki/product/data-model.md and wiki/product/voice-intake.md. Rule: 'not sure' never blocks — leave a field null and move on; only intent + contact.name are truly required.

intent.description: The branch. buy/rent = looking for a property (feeds matching). sell/let = has a property (use the optional `property` block).

phone.description: E.164. Auto-captured from the SLNG call when possible. NOTE: Attio phone is NOT unique by default, so dedupe on email instead (or add a unique phone attribute first). See wiki/build/derisk.md.

email.description: Primary match/dedupe key for the Attio upsert (Attio email is unique by default).

requirements.description: What a buyer/renter wants. Maps onto Attio Lead/Requirements attributes.

must_haves.description: Free text — THE semantic signal for Superlinked (garden, parking, pet-friendly, near a station...). Ask openly.

timeline.description: When they hope to move, e.g. '3 months'.

property.description: SELL/LET path only — the property they have. Optional; null for buy/rent.

financing.description: buy only: 'cash' / 'mortgage' / 'AIP' — hot vs cold qualifier.

consent.description: OK to follow up by WhatsApp + a call. Gates the n8n outreach (architecture stage 4).

source.description: voice = SLNG intake. form = the demo-safe fallback (same JSON, same pipeline).
